title: 10 best herbal creams for shingles
description: Peppermint creams helps with shingles because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The menthol in peppermint cream can help reduce pain, itching, and burning sensations associated with shingles rash, while also relieving tension and stress that can exacerbate symptoms. Additionally, peppermint's antiviral compounds may help shorten the duration and severity of shingles outbreaks by inhibiting the replication of the herpes virus.
